# Beegen
> AI website builder powered by Claude. Describe your website, Beegen builds it in seconds.

Beegen lets anyone create a professional, mobile-ready website by typing a description in plain language. No code, no designers, no templates needed. Each message to the AI costs 1 credit and generates or updates the entire website.

## What Beegen Does
- Builds complete websites from a text description in seconds
- Powered by Claude AI (Anthropic)
- Generates responsive HTML/CSS tailored to your brand
- Supports logo upload and custom colour palettes
- Publishes to a free yoursite.beegen.co subdomain instantly

## Who It's For
- Freelancers and solo creators who need a site fast
- Small business owners without technical skills
- Agencies building sites for clients at scale
- Anyone who wants a professional web presence without hiring a developer

## Pricing
- Free Trial: $0 — 3 credits, build & preview only, no credit card required
- Starter: $19/month — 30 credits, publish to beegen.co, brand settings
- Pro: $39/month — 100 credits, priority builds, ~$0.39/credit
- Agency: $79/month — 300 credits, best value at ~$0.26/credit
- Top-up packs: 25 credits ($10), 75 credits ($25), 200 credits ($60) — never expire

## How Credits Work
One message to the AI = one credit. The AI generates or updates your entire website per message. Credits are only deducted after a successful generation.

## Key URLs
- Homepage: https://beegen.co
- Pricing: https://beegen.co/pricing
- App: https://app.beegen.co
- Sign up: https://app.beegen.co

## Technology
- AI engine: Claude (Anthropic)
- Hosting: Vercel
- Founded: 2025
